# CWE-756: Missing Custom Error Page (mitigated, pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-756-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
)

// Safe: returns a generic message while hiding internal error details.
func FetchProfile(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, db *sql.DB) {
	id := r.URL.Query().Get("id")
	var email string
	err := db.QueryRow("SELECT email FROM profiles WHERE id = $1", id).Scan(&email)
	if err != nil {
		w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
		w.WriteHeader(http.StatusInternalServerError)
		_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]string{"error": "unable to load profile"})
		return
	}
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
	_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]string{"email": email})
}
